tooltip.rarcompat.mimi_dust: When used on a chest, it transforms it into a mimic that drops as many random relics as it originally contained before the transformation.
tooltip.relics.umbrella.description: Softens the fall, providing safe landing from any height. When skillfully used, it can serve as a reliable shield, keeping enemies at bay.
tooltip.relics.umbrella.ability.glider.d: When held in hand, reduces the player's vertical speed, negating fall damage. Pressing LMB propels the player backward and triggers a cooldown. The push can be used multiple times in succession before the player touches the ground.
tooltip.relics.umbrella.ability.shield.d: When used, functions as a shield, pushing targets away.
tooltip.relics.plastic_drinking_hat.desc: Speeds up the drinking process, not only quickly quenching thirst but also replenishing hunger in an extraordinary way.
tooltip.relics.plastic_drinking_hat.abil: Increases drinking speed. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
When consuming liquids, it also restores the player's hunger. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
tooltip.relics.novelty_drinking_hat.desc: Speeds up the drinking process, not only quickly quenching thirst but also replenishing hunger in an extraordinary way.
tooltip.relics.novelty_drinking_hat.abil: Increases drinking speed. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
When consuming liquids, it also restores the player's hunger. Works on potions and any other items with a drinking animation.
tooltip.relics.snorkel.description: Allows for longer underwater exploration without the risk of drowning.
tooltip.relics.snorkel.ability.diving.de: Applies a water breathing effect upon full submersion.
tooltip.relics.snorkel.ability.passive.d: Removes the fog effect in liquids.
tooltip.relics.villager_hat.description: Reduces trading prices with villagers, making deals more profitable.
tooltip.relics.villager_hat.ability.disc: Increases the discount when trading with villagers.
tooltip.relics.villager_hat.ability.pass: Prevents Iron Golems from attacking the player.
tooltip.relics.superstitious_hat.descrip: Increases loot drops from defeated mobs.
tooltip.relics.superstitious_hat.ability: Has a chance to apply an additional level of Looting to defeated mobs. If successful, the ability repeats, adding another Looting level. This continues until the chance fails, summing all levels.
tooltip.relics.anglers_hat.ability.catch: Has a chance to increase the amount of catch received. If successful, the ability triggers again, adding even more catch. The process continues until the chance fails, summing all the catch.
tooltip.relics.lucky_scarf.description: Increases the luck level when mining blocks.
Has a chance to apply an additional level of luck to mined blocks. If successful, the ability triggers again, adding another level of luck. The process continues until the chance fails, summing all the levels.
tooltip.relics.scarf_of_invisibility.des: Makes the player invisible to others when moving cautiously.
tooltip.relics.scarf_of_invisibility.abi: Grants the player complete invisibility. The effect is lost for a short time upon any interaction with the world. If during the absence of invisibility any mob targets the player, the effect will not restore until that mob loses sight of the player.
tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.description: Enhances the agility of the relic bearer's mounts.
tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.ability.cowboy: Increases movement speed and jump height of mounts.
tooltip.relics.cowboy_hat.ability.overlo: When used, this ability allows you to ride and control any mob for limited time. After the time expires or dismounting, it goes on a 1-minute cooldown.
tooltip.relics.night_vision_goggles.desc: Allows the relic bearer to see more clearly in the dark.
tooltip.relics.night_vision_goggles.abil: Enhances the brightness of poorly lit areas and reduces the effectiveness of blindness and darkness.
tooltip.relics.whoopee_cushion.descripti: Mysteriously increases the relic bearer's flatulence, leading to entirely unpredictable outcomes.
tooltip.relics.whoopee_cushion.ability.p: Has a chance to knock back entities within a radius, applying a nausea effect when taking damage or crouching frequently.
tooltip.relics.charm_of_shrinking.descri: Allows the relic bearer to shrink their body to access previously unreachable areas.
tooltip.relics.charm_of_sinking.descript: Grants the relic bearer's legs the ability to absorb air from the ground.
Doubles the player's sinking speed underwater.
While standing on the underwater floor, blocks air consumption and slowly restores air supply.
tooltip.relics.cross_necklace.descriptio: Envelops the relic bearer in a protective aura, granting temporary invulnerability after each hit taken.
tooltip.relics.cross_necklace.ability.in: Increases the duration of invulnerability after taking damage.
tooltip.relics.flame_pendant.description: Burns anyone who dares to attack the relic bearer.
tooltip.relics.flame_pendant.ability.fir: Has a chance to ignite attackers for a duration.
tooltip.relics.panic_necklace.descriptio: Quickens the relic bearer's heartbeat, warning of impending danger.
tooltip.relics.panic_necklace.ability.pa: Increases movement speed based on the number of nearby hostile mobs targeting the player.
tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.description: Strikes with lightning anyone who dares to attack the relic bearer.
tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.ability.pas: Grants complete resistance to lightning damage.
tooltip.relics.shock_pendant.ability.lig: Has a chance to strike attackers with lightning, dealing damage.
tooltip.relics.thorn_pendant.description: Poisons anyone who dares to attack the relic bearer.
tooltip.relics.thorn_pendant.ability.poi: Has a chance to reflect damage and apply poison to attackers.
tooltip.relics.bunny_hoppers.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's legs, allowing them to push off the ground more powerfully.
tooltip.relics.bunny_hoppers.ability.hol: Allows high jumps by continuously holding the jump key.
tooltip.relics.flippers.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's legs, allowing them to swim faster.
tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.descriptio: Grants the relic bearer feline traits, including soft paws and countless lives.
tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.ability.pa: Scares away all Creepers and Phantoms near the player.
tooltip.relics.kitty_slippers.ability.re: Has a chance to save the player from fatal damage, leaving them with 1 health point.
tooltip.relics.rooted_boots.description: Grants the relic bearer the mysterious power of a sheep.
tooltip.relics.rooted_boots.ability.devo: Transforms grass blocks beneath the player into dirt, restoring hunger and saturation.
tooltip.relics.running_shoes.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's legs, allowing them to move faster.
tooltip.relics.snowshoes.description: Improves the relic bearer's mobility in harsh snowy conditions.
tooltip.relics.snowshoes.ability.passive: Allows walking on powder snow without sinking.
tooltip.relics.steadfast_spikes.descript: Firmly anchors the relic bearer's feet to any surface.
Increases resistance to knockback and slippery blocks.
Allows slow wall sliding, negating fall damage.
tooltip.relics.digging_claws.description: Strengthens the relic bearer's hands, allowing them to chop through any blocks more effectively.
tooltip.relics.digging_claws.ability.pas: Reduces the required tool level for all blocks by 1.
tooltip.relics.feral_claws.description: Awakens a bloodthirsty instinct in the relic bearer, making them fight faster with each consecutive attack.
tooltip.relics.feral_claws.ability.claws: Increases the player's attack speed for each consecutive attack performed within 3 seconds of the last. Otherwise, loses 1 charge per second. Attacking with an unfilled attack speed bar resets the accumulated charges.
tooltip.relics.fire_gauntlet.description: Grants the relic bearer's weapon the powers of the fire element.
tooltip.relics.fire_gauntlet.ability.cas: When attacking, releases several sparks that home in on nearby targets, igniting them and dealing damage based on the performed attack. The number of sparks is determined through repeated checks of a chance. Each successful check releases one additional spark, but the process stops as soon as the chance fails even once.
tooltip.relics.golden_hook.description: Allows the relic bearer to perform more precise attacks, retaining more experience from killed mobs.
Increases experience gained from killing mobs.
tooltip.relics.pickaxe_heater.descriptio: Concentrates surrounding heat precisely onto the relic bearer's tools.
tooltip.relics.pickaxe_heater.ability.he: Smelts any mined block if possible, consuming one charge from a buffer. The buffer regenerates charges over time.
tooltip.relics.pocket_piston.description: Grants the relic bearer's hands the strength of mechanisms.
tooltip.relics.pocket_piston.ability.int: Increases maximum interaction range with the world.
tooltip.relics.power_glove.description: Allows the relic bearer to perform empowered attacks.
tooltip.relics.power_glove.ability.power: Increases the player's damage dealt but enters a 5 second cooldown after each attack.
tooltip.relics.vampiric_glove.descriptio: Grants the relic bearer's attacks a vampiric effect, healing them by a portion of the damage dealt.
tooltip.relics.vampiric_glove.ability.va: Heals the player for a percentage of the damage dealt.
tooltip.relics.crystal_heart.description: Grants the relic bearer extra strength by increasing their maximum health.
tooltip.relics.universal_attractor.descr: Manipulates a weak magnetic field around the relic bearer, controlling the gravity of nearby items.
tooltip.relics.universal_attractor.abili: A toggleable ability with 3 modes: Attraction, Repulsion, and Neutrality. Items are affected within a configurable radius.
tooltip.relics.cloud_in_a_bottle.descrip: Enhances the relic bearer's agility, allowing for additional jumps in the air.
tooltip.relics.onion_ring.description: Enhances the relic bearer's block mining efficiency when sufficiently satiated.
Increases block mining speed based on the player's saturation.
tooltip.relics.onion_ring.ability.satura: When mining blocks, has a chance to restore hunger and saturation.
tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.descripti: Enhances the relic bearer's resistance to effects.
tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.ability.a: Reduces the duration of negative effects received.
tooltip.relics.antidote_vessel.ability.d: Each successful attack steals time from all positive effects present on the target.
tooltip.relics.helium_flamingo.descripti: Temporarily allows the relic bearer to glide through air as they would water.
tooltip.relics.helium_flamingo.ability.f: When performing a double jump, allows the player to float in the air for a limited time. Flying speed is proportional to that of the player's swimming speed with an additional bonus.
tooltip.relics.obsidian_skull.descriptio: Redirects heat aimed at harming the relic bearer onto itself.
tooltip.relics.obsidian_skull.ability.he: Completely absorbs damage from fire sources for a limited time. The absorption time regenerates when not taking fire damage.
tooltip.relics.chorus_totem.description: Allows the relic bearer to rewind time when making rash decisions.
tooltip.relics.chorus_totem.ability.past: Each attack against the relic bearer has a chance to teleport the attacker to a random location nearby.
